purpose: Receive, classify, accumulate, and dispatch 40+ event types from CLI to application handlers

activities.title: Receive Raw Event Notification
activities.description: CLI sends JSON-RPC notification with SessionEvent envelope (id, timestamp, parentId, ephemeral, type, data)

activities.title: Classify Event by Type
activities.description: Discriminate event into category: lifecycle (session.*), agent (assistant.*), tool (tool.*), subagent (subagent.*), error (error.*)

activities.title: Accumulate Delta Content
activities.description: For assistant.message_delta events, append deltaContent to buffer; emit partial updates for streaming UX

activities.title: Dispatch to Typed Handlers
activities.description: Route event to type-specific handlers registered via session.on(type, handler); fire in registration order

activities.title: Dispatch to Wildcard Handlers
activities.description: Route every event to wildcard handlers registered via session.on(handler); fire after typed handlers

activities.title: Emit Session Lifecycle Signals
activities.description: Map key events to lifecycle signals: session.idle -> resolve sendAndWait; session.error -> reject promise; session.end -> cleanup
